arts.ttl: Premier League make huge rule change decision impacting Arsenal, Chelsea and Spurs
arts.sum: As seen in other competitions where it's in operation, SOAT speeds up decision-making when it comes to offside calls, using cameras to track "thousands" of touch-points on each player and, of course, the ball. The introduction of semi-automated offside technology [SOAT] has reportedly been delayed until later this year.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou major Tottenham decision in question in opening Europa League clash - Lee Wilmot
arts.sum: Given UEFA's regulations and Spurs ' lack of club-trained players after the departures of Harry Kane, Harry Winks and Oliver Skipp, Spurs could only name a 23-man squad for the newly-expanded league phase. Given Spurs can choose from seven players to play at the back, having Spence as an eighth option would seem to make sense, particularly if you're not going to start Forster.

arts.ttl: 20 goals in three games; Manager showing why Tottenham wanted him before Postecoglou amid perfect start
arts.sum: Spurs wanted the league leading boss in 2023...

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Qarabag - Europa League: Live score, team news and updates as Kick-off is DELAYED due to London travel chaos

arts.ttl: Man Utd set Tottenham clear Champions League challenge after Arsenal and Man City failure
arts.sum: Tottenham are among 18 teams taking part in their first Europa League fixtures on Thursday night when they take on Azerbaijan side Qarabag. But clubs are not only chasing improved Champions League and Europa League places, they are also chasing UEFA coefficient points.

arts.ttl: Man United injury news: Ten Hag delivers squad update ahead of Tottenham battle
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Erik ten Hag issues an update on the club's injury situation ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash with Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Qarabag LIVE: Europa League team news and line-ups as kick-off delayed
arts.sum: Tottenham return to European competition after a year’s absence and take on the champions from Azerbaijan at home

arts.ttl: “Been a player of interest” – Romano makes Tottenham claim regarding attacker with 25 goals & 28 assists
arts.sum: Transfer expert Fabrizio Romano has claimed that Tottenham Hotspur have maintained a long-standing interest in Barcelona winger Raphinha. Speaking on his YouTube channel, Romano revealed that Spurs have always “appreciated” the Brazilian, even before his move to Spain.
